title: poa × sachalinensis var. yatsugatakensis
intro: Poa × sachalinensis var. yatsugatakensis, also known as Yatsugatake fescue grass, is a hybrid plant species in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. The health benefits of Yatsugatake fescue grass include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Yatsugatake fescue grass can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used in traditional medicine practices in Japan and other parts of Asia.
